novel_features.name: Block until preheated
novel_features.description: Wait for the oven to reach its target temperature, then exit 0 (non-zero on timeout).
novel_features.rationale: June exposes no terminal-reachable ready signal; requires consuming the live cavity-telemetry stream and a typed blocking primitive no other June tool offers.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Lets an agent synchronously gate the next cook step on preheat completion instead of busy-waiting.

novel_features.name: Record a cook to local history
novel_features.description: Capture the current cook (session + telemetry/camera activity) into local SQLite.
novel_features.rationale: June's cloud keeps only live state and no history; this is the only durable local record, and it survives oven swaps and cloud changes.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Turns ephemeral live cooks into a queryable local dataset the cloud never stores.
novel_features.group: Local history the cloud never keeps

novel_features.name: Cook history log
novel_features.description: List past cooks (mode, target, duration, outcome) from local history.
novel_features.rationale: No June endpoint returns cook history; only a locally-synced store can answer 'how long did that roast take'.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Answers historical questions about the oven that are impossible through June's API.
novel_features.group: Local history the cloud never keeps

novel_features.name: Temperature-curve export
novel_features.description: Export one recorded cook's temperature/progress samples as JSON or CSV.
novel_features.rationale: Requires per-session telemetry captured locally; June exposes no per-cook curve.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Gives a plottable series for one cook, for analysis or piping.
novel_features.group: Local history the cloud never keeps

novel_features.name: Preheat performance stats
novel_features.description: Median/fastest/slowest time-to-target per cook over recorded cooks.
novel_features.rationale: Derived from local telemetry history June never stores; a cross-session aggregation no single API call provides.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Shows how your specific oven performs over time and whether it is degrading.
novel_features.group: Local history the cloud never keeps

novel_features.name: Predicted time-to-ready
novel_features.description: Non-blocking estimate of time until the oven reaches target, from the live climb rate.
novel_features.rationale: Combines live telemetry with a machine-readable extrapolation no June surface offers.
novel_features.why_it_matters: An agent can sequence the next action off a returned ETA without blocking.

novel_features.name: Named repeatable cooks
novel_features.description: Save a named mode+temp(+timer) preset in local SQLite and replay it with one word.
novel_features.rationale: June has no user-defined quick-cook presets reachable outside its app; the local store makes cooks repeatable by name.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Collapses a repeated weekly cook into a single memorable command.

narrative.headline: Control a June oven from the terminal, plus a durable local cook history and repeatable named cooks that June's live-only cloud never keeps.
narrative.value_prop: Direct pair/preheat/watch/cancel control with no HomeKit and no June app, plus local history (record, log, curve, preheat-stats), workflow primitives (ready, eta), and named repeatable cooks (repeat). All agent-native JSON.
narrative.auth_narrative: Auth is direct pairing: run `juneoven-pp-cli pair` once and type an 8-digit code on the oven. A signing key and access token are stored at ~/.config/juneoven-pp-cli/identity.json (0600).

quickstart.comment: confirm the oven is paired and online
watch live telemetry and camera frames

troubleshoots.fix: run `juneoven-pp-cli pair` and enter the code on the oven
some June firmware streams only camera frames; use `watch` or the oven screen for the preheat signal

narrative.when_to_use: Use this CLI to control your own June oven from a terminal or agent, to keep a local record of cooks the cloud discards, and to script repeatable cooks. It is a direct cloud client, agent-native, with no HomeKit dependency.
anti_triggers: ovens on a different June account than the one paired

recipes.title: Preheat and record
recipes.explanation: Start a cook and capture its session to local history.

recipes.title: Weekly cook by name
recipes.explanation: Replay a saved mode+temp+timer preset in one command.

recipes.title: Export a cook's curve
recipes.explanation: Pull one session's temperature series as CSV for plotting.

trigger_phrases: repeat sunday roast on the oven
